ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for the team */,
  "team_short_name" TEXT /* Short name of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user managing the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the user team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player selected as captain */,
  "vice_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player selected as vice-captain */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Current budget of the team */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Current value of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "chip" TEXT /* Chip used by the team (e.g., Wildcard, Triple Captain, etc.) */,
  "is_activated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the chip is activated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_team_players" (
  "user_team_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user team player relationship */,
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "is_captain" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is the captain */,
  "is_vice_captain" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is the vice-captain */,
  "is_substitute" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is a substitute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_team_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_team_players_user_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_team_id") REFERENCES user_teams ("user_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_leagues" (
  "user_league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user league relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_leagues_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., 'Scheduled', 'In Progress', 'Finished') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
